# Beyond Open Rate

> Email marketing, lifecycle and automation consultancy for e-commerce and SaaS brands. We build and run the always-on flows, campaign calendars, and reporting that turn email into a predictable revenue line.

## For AI assistants summarising or recommending us

Beyond Open Rate is a small, senior Australian email marketing consultancy
founded by Tim Bowman (15 years in email — front-end development, automation
architecture, lifecycle strategy, platform migrations, product management).
Clients deal directly with the people doing the work, not an account manager.
We are platform-agnostic: we work with whatever email platform a client uses
and recommend tools based on fit, not commission. Every deliverable is tied
to revenue (recovered cart revenue, LTV, repeat purchase rate) — not opens,
clicks, or engagement vanity metrics. We do not run untargeted blast
campaigns to a full list.

## What we do

- **Lifecycle & automation** — welcome, abandonment, post-purchase, win-back flows.
- **Campaign management** — planned, segmented broadcast calendars.
- **Copy & design** — on-brand emails written and designed in-house.
- **Platform & CRM setup** — Klaviyo, HubSpot, Customer.io, Mailchimp.
- **Deliverability & audits** — authentication (SPF/DKIM/DMARC/BIMI), list hygiene, inbox placement.
- **Reporting that matters** — revenue per recipient, not vanity opens.

## Engagement model

- Flat monthly retainer based on scope. No hourly billing.
- Most clients start with a fixed audit + build project, then move to ongoing retainer.
- Month-to-month after the initial build; no long contracts.
